mapPresence: Wherever your operation is, Ecosat is there.
mapClose: We connect people, spaces, and technology to transform operations and create value.

origin.label: Chihuahua Headquarters
origin.headline: Where it all began.
origin.body: Our first location marked the beginning of a journey built around connectivity, technology, and the trust of our customers.

timeline.headline: A story of continuous evolution.
timeline.body: Each stage reflects Ecosat’s ability to adapt, grow, and integrate new technologies around operational needs.

radio.label: Radio communications
radio.headline: Where our connection began.
radio.body: Reliable communication solutions built to keep operations connected.

telecom.label: Telecommunications and connectivity
telecom.headline: Infrastructure for connected operations.
telecom.body: We build networks and solutions that connect spaces, systems, and people.

integration.label: Technology integration
integration.headline: Systems working as one.
integration.body: We integrate technology, security, and infrastructure into connected operational environments.

solutions.label: Comprehensive solutions
solutions.headline: Connected technology for complete operations.
solutions.body: We design ecosystems that integrate infrastructure, information, and control to create greater operational value.

expansion.headline: A growing presence.
expansion.body: Our evolution allows us to support operations across new regions and markets.

presence.label: Ecosat expansion
presence.headline: Where your operation is, Ecosat is there.
presence.body: Our presence connects infrastructure, technology, and teams across different regions of Mexico and North America.

industriesTitle: Trust is earned inside the operation.
industriesLead: Ecosat connects technology to how each operation actually runs.
clientsTitle: Clients who trust Ecosat with operations that cannot stand still.
industriesClose: Ecosat is trusted not only for what it can install, but for what it understands, connects, and continues to support.
worldsLead: Infrastructure that sees, hears, and protects your operation connects with intelligence that turns information into decisions.
integrationDescription: Infrastructure, systems, and connectivity for your operation.
digitalDescription: The intelligence that turns infrastructure into decisions.
worldsClose: A complete service: from infrastructure to intelligence.
